for small businesses
If you're buried in bookkeeping, who's leading the company?
We handle your books, but that's just the start. Get intelligent dashboards plus strategic guidance from former CFOs and operators who can answer "Where can I cut costs without hurting growth?"
*
TALK TO OUR TEAM
START FREE TRIAL
Trusted by 3,000+ growth-driven startups and small businesses
Case study
Case study
We handle bookkeeping, tax, accounting and advisory work for startups and small businesses.
It's 50/50 people and software—smart tools for instant insights, expert people for strategic guidance. Both working together on your business.
Track company expenses in real time
Find the $2,000/month you didn't know you were wasting.
Model cash flow scenarios
Know if you can afford new hires well before you make the offers.
Sleep better at tax time
Get IRS-ready books year-round that stay compliant and maximize what you keep.
Smart tools. Smarter people. Confident decisions.
Stop digging through spreadsheets for answers you need right now.
"Why are sales up but cash flow is down?"
"What happens if we hire two more people?"
"Which expenses are growing faster than revenue?"
You shouldn't need a finance degree to
understand your own business.
Better business decisions with complete financial confidence.
Get guidance from CFOs who've been there.
Tired of accountants who don't understand your business? Our US-based advisory team includes seasoned CFOs and operators who know what expanding business financials should look like.
Yi Jean Lim
Former investment banker with a background in venture capital
"We bring reality-anchored clarity and a focus on rapid time-to-value.
Informed by insights from many companies, I help you understand your financials, align on the right narrative for your stakeholders, and focus on the goals that truly matter."
Cole Levin
Former Fortune 500 Finance Director and startup founder
"I've guided over 75 startups and companies through everything from seed rounds to 9-figure exits.
The difference between companies that scale and those that stall? They measure what matters and make data-driven bets on growth."
Neha Banik
Former Corporate Strategist at a global investment bank
"I’ve spent 12+ years helping leaders decide what's next.
Small businesses don't need more data—they need clear financials and someone in their corner who actually gets the day-to-day grind. That's what we do."
To succeed, you need resources—a trusted advisor, a partner with experience who says 'Yes, I see it, and I know what will help.'
Whether you're scaling from 2 to 20 people or preparing for your exit—Pilot  works for growing businesses.
Your ambition to build something significant matters more than your current size. We work with growth-minded businesses at every stage.
Growth scenarios we support:
Expanding Teams
"We keep running out of cash. How do I know if we can afford three more hires?"
Securing Capital
"Investors want financial projections. How do I model different growth scenarios?"
Optimizing for Profitability
"Revenue is up 40% but profits aren't. Where are we bleeding money?"
Planning Your Exit
"We want to sell in two years. What financial foundation do we need to build now?"
These complex questions require expertise that the average bookkeeping firm can’t provide. We've helped companies navigate everything from raising capital to valuations to international expansion.
PROOF FROM PEOPLE DOING IT
Here's how we solve the exact problems keeping you up at night.
The rapid growth crisis
THE PROBLEM
Rapid growth from 5 to 50 people created dangerous cash flow cycles—looked profitable on paper but repeatedly came close to running out of cash.
WHAT WE BUILT
Switched from cash to accrual accounting for true visibility, worked through $1M invoice backlog, and provided CFO modeling for cash planning.
THE RESULT
"The growth almost killed us multiple times. We had an additional million dollars in invoices that weren't coming in and the CFO team was there with strategies. One year later, consultants are booking 20% more revenue." - Jay Boyer, General Partner
Read story
wATCH VIDEO
The founder bottleneck problem
THE PROBLEM
Business owner was personally pulling and analyzing every financial number, running bookkeeping and KPI analysis—becoming the bottleneck preventing growth focus.
WHAT WE BUILT
Streamlined bookkeeping workflow, built financial models for securing capital, and created KPI dashboards tracking marketing funnels to supply chain performance.
THE RESULT
"Pilot helped secure our most recent funding and built data rooms that helped me close our financing. The main reason I'd recommend Pilot is so business owners can spend less time working in the business and more time working on the business." - Katie Spies, Founder & CEO
Read story
The Challenge of Raising a Round
THE PROBLEM
OptimalAI needed to raise its pre-seed round and had just a matter of weeks to do it.
WHAT WE BUILT
Pilot set up their books and produced the investor-ready financials they needed to raise
in just 4 weeks
. Pilot also handled all the compliance paperwork for multi-state hiring so Iba could focus.
THE RESULT
"There was probably a four-week timeline between incorporation and closing our first round ... Our investors constantly ask us why our books are always on time and why it's so easy for them to pull financials. Pilot is our support system!"
Read iba's story
wATCH VIDEO
Clearing the way for M&A
THE PROBLEM
There’s nothing more frightening than a third-party looking under the hood of your company to scrutinize every detail, decision, and transaction. In preparing to sell Passage AI, Ravi knew they needed airtight financial books.
WHAT WE BUILT
Pilot’s bookkeepers helped Ravi produce triple-checked, accurate financials. They were so effective, they caught unpaid invoices and errors from vendors.
THE RESULT
Passage AI was able to track its growth without much effort and easily update investors. “I just forward what Pilot sends me. It saves a lot of time and there’s never any back-and-forth,” says Ravi Raj, CEO and Co-founder. Passage AI was successfully acquired by ServiceNow.
Read story
When business owners come to us, we transform what accounting can do: showing where cash is going, increasing profitability, and catching issues before they become problems.
Not ready to talk? Get free insights that move the needle.
Skip the generic small business advice. These are strategic insights we’ve developed from helping thousands of businesses navigate real growth complexity.
Forecast your cash flow
Learn how to achieve cash flow positivity and reduce reliance on external capital.
READ MORE
Manage your costs
Find out where to cut expenses without killing growth momentum.
READ MORE
See your key indicators
Know the metrics that actually matter as you scale.
READ MORE
Raise your Series A
Find out what your books need to look like before you start raising.
READ MORE
Three ways to get the back office support your business needs.
Solve this now
Let's discuss your specific growth challenges and financial strategy. Get clarity on cash flow, hiring decisions, and scaling complexity.
talk to our team
Explore Pilot's approach
See exactly how we combine real-time financial intelligence with strategic guidance. Understand why the 50/50 approach works.

startups
and growth-minded
business
owners who are just getting started.
Whether you need immediate support, want to explore our approach, or you're early-stage but growth-focused—there's a path that works for you.
Every conversation starts with understanding your business goals.

Pilot is a provider of back-office services, including bookkeeping, controller services, and CFO services.
Pilot is not a public accounting firm and does not provide services that would require a license to practice public accountancy.
Cookie Notice
Cookie Notice
Your Privacy
Strictly Necessary
Performance Cookies
Functional Cookies
Targeting Cookies
Your Privacy
In accordance with applicable law, Pilot.com, Inc. (“Pilot,” “we,” “us,” or “our”), our service providers, and other third party website services providers whose services we use on our corporate website use commonly-used tools to recognize your visit and track your interactions with our corporate website (including subpages) such as cookies, web beacons, pixels, local shared objects, local storage, event trackers, and other tracking technologies (collectively, “Cookies”). We use this tracking data to operate our corporate website.  Please see our Privacy Policy for further information.
Additional information on categories of Cookies can be found below.
Privacy Policy
Strictly Necessary
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems.
Performance Cookies
Always Active
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.
Functional Cookies
Always Active
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalization. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages.
Targeting Cookies
Always Active
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

Just a few of the companies we’ve supported over the years
Why we're different
There’s a reason that we’re the largest startup and small business accounting firm in the US
The most tech-forward
We have an unbeatable combo: a team of finance experts paired with a top-notch in-house engineering team.
The result? Deep integrations with the tools you already use, and a seamless platform for staying on top of everything.
The most experienced
We’re trusted by thousands of companies because we’ve helped countless startups and small businesses achieve success.
We understand the unique challenges that come with growing a business and have the expertise you need to reach your goals.
The most scalable
We’re the last accounting firm you’ll ever need to hire.
We support tiny startups and large companies, so no matter how your needs evolve, we’ve got you covered.
Additional Services
Stock Administration
For startups issuing equity through Carta or Pulley.
$399
/hr
Free for pre-seed founders. $399/hr for everyone else.
Keep your cap table accurate from day one. Pre-seed founders with up to five people on the cap table can get started free with our Founders Tier: cap table setup, platform configuration, and equity questions answered, at no cost.
When your company grows, so does the service.
Learn more

Join the conversation
Jessica McKellar
Founder and CEO at Pilot
Aug 15
I did a business review with a company that was paying for 3 different AI note takers (only 1 of which was being used), a bunch of OpenAI Pro licenses that weren’t being used (on top of an OpenAI Teams account), Grammarly for customer-facing comms that the team never adopted, and we ran out of time before we could get to reviewing and pruning several abandoned AI marketing tools. It was all-in thousands of dollars per month in wasted subscriptions.
The accidental playbook:
1. Modern credit card platforms make it easy to provision virtual cards. (Great)
2. Everyone on the team is given a card. (Not what I recommend, but I get why this happens in the early days)
3. Team members constantly try out new (subscription) AI tools. (Great, stay on the cutting-edge)
4. Team members stop using the tools and forget to cancel them, and nobody notices. (Bad)
5. The team is now paying for a bunch of abandoned services. (Bad)
6. The team signs up for Pilot, they have books and financials for the first time, and they realize they need to cancel a bunch of subscriptions. (Better late than never)
We actually built out a COO program because so many founders wanted help managing this type of operational work, where it doesn’t make sense to make an in-house hire yet, but it also doesn’t make sense for a founder to spend time on this.
78
4
Comments
Waseem Daher
Founder @ Pilot.com | Accounting & tax for startups and small businesses
Oct 10
"I have found people willing to tolerate any level of chronic pain in order to avoid acute pain. People would much rather lose slowly over five years than have the conversation that involves a dramatic change to stop losing."
- Marc Andreessen
23
4
Comments
Cole Levin
Head of Consulting Services at Pilot
Mar 14
Your treasury management strategy in 45 seconds:
1. Spread your cash across three accounts
A checking account at bank A with three-months operating expenses
A backup checking account at bank B with two-months payroll
A treasury management account at bank A, B, or C
2. At 2-3 banks:
Traditional like JP Morgan Chase, HSBC, etc.
Startup banks like Bridge Bank and Banc of California
Neobanks like Mercury, Rho, and Arc
3. This helps you achieve your three directives (in this order): Preserve the capitalKeep it available (liquid)Earn the highest yield
4. Keep that setup simple
You should spend no more than 1hr on treasury management per month.
23

analysis.name: Pilot
analysis.tagline: If you're buried in bookkeeping, who's leading the company?
analysis.value_proposition: Managed bookkeeping, tax, and CFO advisory for startups and SMBs, combining AI-powered software with US-based human experts.
analysis.ideal_customer: Growth-stage startups and small businesses (2–200 employees) that want to fully outsource their back-office finance function and get strategic CFO guidance without hiring full-time finance staff.

features.name: cash-basis bookkeeping
features.description: Books maintained on cash basis using bank and credit card data
features.evidence_quote: Cash-basis bookkeeping using data from your bank and credit cards

features.name: accrual-basis bookkeeping
features.description: Accrual accounting pulling from bank, credit cards, payroll, AP, inventory, and payment platforms
features.evidence_quote: Cash or accrual-basis bookkeeping that pulls from your bank, credit cards, payroll, AP, inventory, and payment platforms

features.name: ai transaction categorization
features.description: AI automatically categorizes transactions and reconciles accounts monthly
features.evidence_quote: AI categorizes transactions, reconciles accounts, and closes books monthly

features.name: ai accountant
features.description: AI assistant that answers questions about past transactions, current cash flow, and runs planning scenarios
features.evidence_quote: Instant AI answers about past transactions and current cash flow, plus run scenarios to plan ahead

features.name: monthly book closing
features.description: Books closed and delivered on a recurring monthly cadence
features.evidence_quote: AI categorizes transactions, reconciles accounts, and closes books monthly

features.name: standard chart of accounts
features.description: Pre-built standard chart of accounts included at entry tier

features.name: custom chart of accounts
features.description: Custom chart of accounts tailored to the business

features.name: year-end tax package
features.description: IRS-ready year-end financial package prepared for tax filing
features.evidence_quote: Year-end package for your tax preparer

features.name: dedicated us-based bookkeeper
features.description: Named US-based bookkeeper who handles, explains, and reviews books
features.evidence_quote: US-based bookkeeper who handles, explains, and reviews your books

features.name: bill management
features.description: Manages up to 10 vendor bills per month at Core tier
features.evidence_quote: Bill management for up to 10 vendor bills per month

features.name: financial reports
features.description: Standardized financial reports delivered on the 10th business day (6th at Custom tier)

features.name: expedited reporting
features.description: Reports delivered on the 6th business day instead of the standard 10th

features.name: accounts receivable
features.description: Full accounts receivable management at Custom tier

features.name: accounts payable
features.description: Full accounts payable management at Custom tier

features.name: payroll administration
features.description: Payroll processing and administration as an add-on or Custom tier service

features.name: in-app messaging support
features.description: Customer support via in-app messaging at entry tier

features.name: dedicated team support (email and phone)
features.description: Support from dedicated team via in-app, email, and phone at Core tier
features.evidence_quote: Support from your dedicated team in-app, email, and over the phone

features.name: slack support for cfo clients
features.description: CFO advisor reachable via Slack in addition to in-app, email, and phone
features.evidence_quote: Connect with your dedicated CFO in-app, by email, phone, or Slack

features.name: dashboards and insights
features.description: Real-time financial dashboards showing company expenses and performance metrics
features.evidence_quote: Track company expenses in real time. Find the $2,000/month you didn't know you were wasting.

features.name: cash flow scenario modeling
features.description: Model cash flow under different hiring and spending scenarios
features.evidence_quote: Model cash flow scenarios. Know if you can afford new hires well before you make the offers.

features.name: industry-specific kpi dashboard
features.description: KPI dashboard tailored to the client's industry included at CFO tier

features.name: budget vs actuals variance analysis
features.description: Monthly comparison of budget to actual results with CFO commentary

features.name: custom financial model
features.description: Bespoke financial model built for the business with strategic insights
features.evidence_quote: Custom financial model with strategic insights

features.name: scenario planning model
features.description: Forward-looking scenario planning model at CFO tier

features.name: monthly cfo call
features.description: Recurring monthly strategy call with a dedicated CFO

features.name: dedicated fractional cfo
features.description: Assigned CFO advisor with background in venture-backed or Fortune 500 finance
features.evidence_quote: Get guidance from CFOs who've been there... US-based advisory team includes seasoned CFOs and operators

features.name: fundraising support
features.description: CFO-led financial modeling and narrative for investor fundraising
features.evidence_quote: CFO advisory, financial planning, and fundraising support

features.name: complex business structure support
features.description: Support for multi-entity or otherwise complex corporate structures

features.name: custom workflows and reporting
features.description: Bespoke back-office workflows and financial reporting configurations

features.name: quickbooks migration
features.description: Option to keep and migrate existing QuickBooks account and historical data
features.evidence_quote: Keep your existing QuickBooks account and historical data

features.name: outsourced coo / operations services
features.description: Full outsourced COO and back-office operations management

features.name: stock administration
features.description: Cap table and equity/stock administration services

features.name: r&d tax credit
features.description: R&D tax credit identification, calculation, and filing

features.name: federal income tax filing
features.description: Federal income tax return preparation and filing

features.name: state income tax filing
features.description: State income tax return preparation and filing

features.name: delaware franchise tax filing
features.description: Delaware franchise tax filing for incorporated entities

features.name: free tax extension
features.description: Automatic filing of IRS/state tax extension at no extra charge

features.name: quarterly estimated tax payments
features.description: Quarterly safe-harbor estimated tax payment calculations and reminders

features.name: 1099-nec filing
features.description: Preparation and filing of 1099-NEC forms for contractors

features.name: schedule c filing
features.description: Schedule C for single-member LLC income and loss reporting
features.evidence_quote: Schedule C for your LLC's income and loss

features.name: individual tax return (1040)
features.description: Personal 1040 tax return filing for owners/founders

features.name: foreign subsidiary tax filing (form 5471)
features.description: IRS Form 5471 filing for foreign subsidiaries

features.name: foreign shareholder return (form 5472)
features.description: IRS Form 5472 filing for foreign shareholders of US corporations

features.name: fbar filing
features.description: Foreign Bank and Financial Account (FBAR) reporting

features.name: tax consulting services
features.description: Hourly tax strategy and consulting beyond standard return prep
features.evidence_quote: Tax consulting services — Starts at $250 / hour

features.name: year-round tax support
features.description: Email support available throughout the year, not just at filing time

features.name: multi-source data ingestion
features.description: Pulls transactions from bank, credit cards, payroll, AP, inventory, and payment platforms
features.evidence_quote: pulls from your bank, credit cards, payroll, AP, inventory, and payment platforms

features.name: burn rate calculator
features.description: Self-service online tool to calculate startup burn rate and runway
features.evidence_quote: Burn Rate Calculator: Calculate Your Burn Rate and Startup Runway

features.name: founder salary report
features.description: Annual benchmarking report of what 1,800+ startup founders pay themselves
features.evidence_quote: Founder Salary Report 2025 — We asked 1,844 startup founders what they pay themselves.

features.name: resource hub / educational content
features.description: Library of guides, calculators, playbooks, and webinars for founders
features.evidence_quote: Pick your journey to growth — The new company path, the growth path, the finance basics path...

features.name: smb booster program
features.description: Bundled service package tailored for established small businesses

features.name: startup booster program
features.description: Bundled service package for early-stage startups

features.name: switch-to-accrual accounting migration
features.description: Migrates company from cash to accrual accounting for better operational visibility
features.evidence_quote: Switched from cash to accrual accounting for true visibility, worked through $1M invoice backlog

features.name: free trial
features.description: Trial period available for small businesses before committing to a paid plan
features.evidence_quote: start FREE TRIAL for small businesses

differentiators: 50/50 people and software model — AI tools plus human expert review on every engagement
US-based advisory team of former CFOs, Fortune 500 finance directors, and investment bankers
Trusted by 3,000+ growth-driven startups and small businesses
Strategic CFO guidance included alongside bookkeeping — not just compliance work
Transparent, published pricing for bookkeeping and tax (rare in outsourced accounting)
Industry-specific service packages (AI companies, law firms, health & life sciences, franchises, etc.)
Pre-revenue startup discounts explicitly offered on Core bookkeeping and tax plans

free_tier.limits: Free trial only — no permanent free tier; self-serve tools (calculators, reports) free

tiers.name: Bookkeeping Essentials
tiers.headline_inclusions: Cash-basis books, AI categorization, standard COA, year-end package, in-app support; up to $100K/mo expenses

tiers.name: Bookkeeping Core
tiers.headline_inclusions: Dedicated US bookkeeper, cash or accrual, bill mgmt (10/mo), custom COA, reports by 10th biz day

tiers.name: Bookkeeping Custom
tiers.headline_inclusions: Full AR/AP, payroll admin, CFO advisory, reports by 6th biz day, QuickBooks migration, custom workflows

tiers.name: Tax — Single Member LLC
tiers.headline_inclusions: Federal + state filing, Schedule C, quarterly payments, 1 each of W-2/K-1/rental/1099 income; $1,000+/yr

tiers.name: Tax — Partnership and S-Corp
tiers.headline_inclusions: Federal + state + Delaware franchise, up to 25 1099-NEC filings, year-round email support; $2,000+/yr

tiers.name: Tax — C-Corp
tiers.headline_inclusions: Federal + state + Delaware franchise, up to 10 1099-NEC filings, year-round email support; $2,450+/yr

tiers.name: CFO Basic
tiers.headline_inclusions: Custom financial model, budget vs actuals, scenario planning, industry KPI dashboard, monthly CFO call

tiers.name: CFO Essentials
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything in CFO Basic plus expanded CFO services (full details truncated in source)

pricing.notes: Bookkeeping pricing is expense-volume-based (Essentials caps at $100K/mo expenses; Core minimum ~$9K/mo expenses). Tax plans billed annually and must be purchased with a Pilot bookkeeping plan. Pre-revenue startups and newly incorporated entities get discounted rates (starts at $750/yr). Additional fees for extra states, cities, foreign subsidiaries, FBAR, and hourly tax consulting. COO services tier exists but pricing not captured in source. All CFO plans billed annually.
